MARISAMOD-MINI_HAKKERO.title: Mini Hakkero
MARISAMOD-MINI_HAKKERO.description: While your [gold]Charge-Up[/gold] is less than [blue]8[/blue], gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Charge-Up[/gold].
MARISAMOD-MINI_HAKKERO.flavor: A mini-Eight Trigram Furnace, a gift from Rinosuke when Marisa left her parents.
MARISAMOD-BEWITCHED_HAKKERO.title: Bewitched Hakkero
MARISAMOD-BEWITCHED_HAKKERO.description: When you play a card, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Charge-Up[/gold].
MARISAMOD-BEWITCHED_HAKKERO.flavor: Its firepower is on a new level, but is it ok to use a bewitched tool?
MARISAMOD-SIMPLE_LAUNCHER.title: Simple Launcher
MARISAMOD-SIMPLE_LAUNCHER.description: Reduce your [gold]Charge-Up[/gold] trigger threshold from [blue]8[/blue] to [blue]6[/blue].
MARISAMOD-SIMPLE_LAUNCHER.flavor: A flashlight is a flashlight,no matter how it is called...
MARISAMOD-AMPLIFY_WAND.title: Amplify Wand
MARISAMOD-AMPLIFY_WAND.flavor: A Wand seems to not used often.
MARISAMOD-MAGIC_BROOM.title: Magic Broom
MARISAMOD-MAGIC_BROOM.description: Every third time you play a 0-cost card, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
MARISAMOD-MAGIC_BROOM.flavor: Marisa always travels on her flying broom.
MARISAMOD-HANDMADE_GRIMOIRE.title: Homemade Grimoire
MARISAMOD-HANDMADE_GRIMOIRE.description: At the start of each battle, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw a card for every [blue]15[/blue] cards in your deck.
MARISAMOD-HANDMADE_GRIMOIRE.flavor: Actually a notebook full of experiment records and magic material recipes;just how Marisa develops her Magics.
